zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Felton於大約1361年出生在英國諾福爾可利其哈姆時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Felton38歲，母親Lady Joan Walkfare37歲。她於大約1370年與Sir Robert de Ufford在英國素可阿盧德爾結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1400年8月8日在英國素福爾可貝爾斯亞德享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Felton于大约1361年出生在英国諾福爾可利其哈姆时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Felton38岁，母亲Lady Joan Walkfare37岁。她于大约1370年与Sir Robert de Ufford在英国素可阿盧德爾结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1400年8月8日在英国素福爾可貝爾斯亞德享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Felton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called. Most of them, including those in Herefordshire, Shropshire, and Somerset (Winford), are named from Old English feld ‘pasture, open country’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Another place of the same name in Somerset, also known as Whitchurch, has as its first element Old English filethe ‘hay’. Felton Hill in Northumberland is named with the Old English personal name Fygla (a derivative of fugol ‘bird’; compare Fowle ).

variants.name: Fowle
meanings: English (Kent): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Foghel, Fughel (Old English Fugel, Fugol, from Old English fugol ‘fowl, bird’). Alternatively, a nickname from Middle English fughel, foghel, foul ‘fowl, bird’, either with reference to physical appearance, size, or behavior, or possibly also a nickname for someone who kept or sold birds.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Felton was born about 1361, in Litcham, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Thomas de Felton, was 38 and her mother, Lady Joan Walkfare, was 37. She married Sir Robert de Ufford about 1370, in Arundel, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died on 8 August 1400, in Belstead, Suffolk, England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Felton est née environ 1361, à Litcham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Felton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Walkfare, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Ufford environ 1370, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 août 1400, à Belstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Felton um 1361 in Litcham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Felton 38 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan Walkfare 37. Sie hat um 1370 in Arundel, Sussex, England Sir Robert de Ufford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. August 1400 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Belstead, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Felton è nata il circa 1361 nel Litcham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Felton, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Lady Joan Walkfare, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert de Ufford circa 1370, nel Arundel, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 8 agosto 1400, nel Belstead, Suffolk, England, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Feltonが約1361年にイギリスノーフォルクリトチャムで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Feltonは38歳，母Lady Joan Walkfareは37歳であった。約1370年にイギリススセックスアルンデルでSir Robert de Uffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1400年8月8日にイギリススフォルクベルステアドで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Felton(이)가 대략 1361년 영국 노르폴크 리트챔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Felton(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan Walkfare(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1370년 영국 수세스 아런들에서 Sir Robert de Ufford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 8월 8일 영국 수폴크 벨스테아드에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Wrentham, Suffolk, England: Wrentham, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Felton nasceu aproximadamente 1361, em Litcham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Felton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Walkfare, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Ufford aproximadamente 1370, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1400, em Belstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Felton родилась около 1361 г. в местности личам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Felton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Walkfare, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Ufford около 1370 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла 8 августа 1400 г. в местности белстид, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Felton nació aproximadamente 1361, en Litcham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas de Felton, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Walkfare, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Sir Robert de Ufford aproximadamente 1370, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1400, en Belstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
